channel.title: Posts on jyrobin & posts
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on jyrobin & posts

item.title: Hello, World?
item.description: Hello, World? Not an intriguing topic to write as my first story. Please bear with me as I just like to start murmuring something that emerges in my mind, for no particular reason. Is it the reason many, if not most, bloggers do? I’ll have to image so. So don’t tell me your answer. Well, I don’t remember in what language I write my first “hello world” program. My best guess would be Pascal or C, as I don’t recall doing so using Basic on my first Apple II computer.
